items_library.name: Three Knots — Starter Items
items_library.author: Three Knots Project
items_library.description: Starter items for a B/X-flavored dungeon pack: simple weapons and armor, torches and rope, a short line of consumables, and the module's signature reward blade. No damage-type metadata; the ruleset is typeless.

longsword.name: Longsword
longsword.description: A plain steel longsword, well-kept. A workmanlike blade for a working fighter.

shortbow.name: Shortbow
shortbow.description: A hunter's bow of ash and horn. Ammunition tracked separately.

silver_dagger.name: Silver-Edged Dagger
silver_dagger.description: A short blade with a silvered edge. Costs more than it should; worth more than it cost, when the dead come walking.

chain_mail.name: Chain Mail
chain_mail.description: Linked rings of steel over a padded coat. Heavy, loud in the halls, and proof against most edges.

leather_armor.name: Leather Armor
leather_armor.description: Boiled and fitted hide. Light, quiet, not much.

iron_shield.name: Iron-Rimmed Shield
iron_shield.description: An iron-rimmed wooden shield, scored by old fights.

healing_potion.name: Healing Potion
healing_potion.description: A red-brown draught in a stoppered vial. Tastes like bark and blood.

antitoxin.name: Antitoxin
antitoxin.description: A cloudy herbal tincture. Clears most poisons if taken before they take hold.

holy_water.name: Vial of Holy Water
holy_water.description: Water blessed in the Keeper's temple. Still, cold, and faintly luminous.

consumable.amount: Thrown as a ranged attack at an undead creature: 1d8 damage on a hit. Poured on an unconscious undead: 1d8 automatic. Has no effect on the living.

torch.name: Torch
torch.description: Pitch-soaked oakwood. Bright for about an hour, then smoke and stub.

lantern_hooded.name: Hooded Lantern
lantern_hooded.description: A tin lantern with a louvered shutter. Burns six hours on a pint of oil.

rope_50ft.name: Rope, 50 ft
rope_50ft.description: Fifty feet of good hemp, coiled. Holds a man easily.

rations.name: Trail Rations
rations.description: A day's hard bread, dried meat, and the usual unremarkable cheese.

waterskin.name: Waterskin
waterskin.description: A leather skin, full. Good for a day afield, less in summer.

bedroll.name: Bedroll
bedroll.description: Wool roll and oilcloth. No warmer than it ought to be, but enough.

sword_of_the_dawn.name: Sword of the Dawn
sword_of_the_dawn.description: A longsword of pale steel with a sun engraved on the pommel. The blade holds its edge without honing, and in deep shadow it sheds a dim, almost-warm light.

magic.special_effects: Sheds dim light in a 15-foot radius while drawn. Undead struck by the Sword of the Dawn take an additional 1d6 damage; the blade flares briefly at the moment of contact.
